    • Package uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner

      • Class uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner.CodeRefinementIntent

        class CodeRefinementIntent extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • anchorMemberName
            String anchorMemberName
            The simple name or signature of the anchor member to position against. Used in conjunction with RelativePosition.
          • classFqn
            String classFqn
            The fully qualified name of the target class container. Used for resolving the container during structural inserts. Nested types should use the '$' separator.
          • declaration
            String declaration
            The exact string declaration (signature) of the member. This should include modifiers, return types, and parameter lists but NOT the body or Javadoc.
          • innerBlockOrInitializer
            String innerBlockOrInitializer
            The code body or initializer expression. For methods, this is the code inside the braces. For fields, it is the expression following the assignment operator.
          • javadoc
            JavadocIntent javadoc
            The structured Javadoc configuration to apply to the member. Allows for synchronous documentation and code updates.
          • memberFqn
            String memberFqn
            The absolute fully qualified name of the target member to perform the operation on. Supports methods, fields, and inner classes. Method FQNs must include full parameter types (type erasure applied).
          • position
            RelativePosition position
            The relative position constraint for insertion or moving operations. Requires an anchor member if using BEFORE or AFTER.
          • reason
            String reason
            A human-readable reason explaining the intent. Visible in the UI during the refinement review phase.
          • type
            CodeRefinementIntent.Type type
            The type of structural modification to perform (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, MOVE).

      • Class uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.coderefiner.JavadocIntent

        class JavadocIntent extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • authors
            List<String> authors
            The list of author names associated with the @author tag.
          • description
            String description
            The main Javadoc description (Markdown or HTML). Supports inline tags like {@inheritDoc}, {@link}, {@code}.
          • params
            Map<String,String> params
            A map of parameter names to their descriptions for the @param tag.
          • returns
            String returns
            The description of the return value for the @return tag.
          • since
            List<String> since
            The list of versions associated with the @since tag.
          • tags
            List<String> tags
            Optional list of additional block tags (e.g. ['version 1.0', 'see OtherClass']).
          • thrownExceptions
            Map<String,String> thrownExceptions
            A map of exception FQNs to their descriptions for the @throws tag.

            The fully qualified name (FQN) of the target class where this intent will be applied. If left null or empty, the intent targets the file-level.

            String name

      • Class uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project.components.ProjectComponent

        class ProjectComponent extends ProjectNode implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • annotatedName
            String annotatedName
            The display name provided by the IDE's node system. This typically contains Git/SVN status indicators like "[M]" or "[A]".
          • children
            List<ProjectComponent> children
            The list of child components, typically representing nested or inner types.
          • fqn
            String fqn
            The fully qualified name of the Java type. This is null for physical files that do not represent a primary Java type.
          • kind
            ElementKind kind
            The Java element kind (e.g., CLASS, INTERFACE, ENUM, PACKAGE).
          • parent
            ProjectComponent parent
            The parent component in the hierarchy. This is used to distinguish between top-level types and inner/nested types.

            String currentFolderName
            The pending folder name selected by the user.

            This acts as an edit buffer. Changes are only committed to the provider domain object when AiProviderPanel.syncToProvider() is invoked.

          • customHeadersArea
            JTextArea customHeadersArea
            Vendor-specific quirks defined as Key: Value headers.
          • displayNameField
            JTextField displayNameField
            User-facing name for this provider instance.
          • enabledCheck
            JCheckBox enabledCheck
            Master switch to enable/disable the provider globally.
          • folderLabel
            JLabel folderLabel
            Visual indicator of where this provider's data is stored on the host FS.
          • preferHttp11Check
            JCheckBox preferHttp11Check
            Toggle for forcing HTTP/1.1 on OpenAI-compatible providers.
          • provider
            AbstractAiProvider provider
            The domain entity representing the AI provider being configured.
          • testConnectionBtn
            JButton testConnectionBtn
            Triggers an immediate model discovery probe to verify the URL and Auth.
          • textArea
            JTextArea textArea
            Monospace editor for the 'api_keys.txt' file, supporting multiple keys.
          • tokenizerCombo
            JComboBox<TokenizerType> tokenizerCombo
            Selector for the tokenizer used for pre-flight metabolic estimations.
          • vertexCheck
            JCheckBox vertexCheck
            Checkbox to toggle Google Cloud Vertex AI endpoint usage.

          • agi
            Agi agi

          • agiConfig
            SwingAgiConfig agiConfig
            The UI-specific configuration for this agi session, including themes and providers.
          • candidateSelectionPanel
            CandidateSelectionPanel candidateSelectionPanel
            The panel for displaying and selecting between multiple response candidates.
          • configPanel
            SessionConfigPanel configPanel
            The panel for editing request configuration such as temperature and thinking levels.
          • contextPanel
            ContextPanel contextPanel
            The panel for managing the AI context, including history pruning and resource browsing.
          • conversationPanel
            ConversationPanel conversationPanel
            The main scrollable conversation view where message panels are rendered.
          • cwGcPanel
            CwGcPanel cwGcPanel
            The panel for monitoring Context Window Garbage Collection (CwGC) metrics.
          • headerPanel
            HeaderPanel headerPanel
            The header panel for session identity and model/provider selection.
          • inputPanel
            InputPanel inputPanel
            The primary user input panel, supporting multimodal attachments and command completion.
          • statusPanel
            StatusPanel statusPanel
            The status panel for real-time monitoring of API calls and token usage.
          • supportPanel
            SupportPanel supportPanel
            The panel providing support links, documentation, and community resources.
          • tabbedPane
            JTabbedPane tabbedPane
            The tabbed pane for switching between chat, configuration, and metabolic metrics.
          • toolbarPanel
            ToolbarPanel toolbarPanel
            The vertical toolbar panel for primary session-level action toggles.

      • Class uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.chat.ConversationPanel

        class ConversationPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • agi

            The active agi session orchestrating the conversation flow.
          • agiPanel
            AgiPanel agiPanel
            The parent container providing shared configuration and access to the agi session.

            boolean autoScroll
            A stateful flag that determines if the viewport should automatically snap to the latest message when content changes.

            An internal cache of message panels to enable high-performance incremental updates and reuse.
          • historyListener
            EdtPropertyChangeListener historyListener
            The property change listener bound to the context manager's history to trigger structural updates on the EDT.
          • messagesPanel
            ScrollablePanel messagesPanel
            The scrollable content area where individual message panels are rendered.
          • scrollPane
            JScrollPane scrollPane
            The scroll pane managing the vertical viewport of the conversation history.

    • Package uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources.view

      • Class uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources.view.AbstractTextResourceViewer

        class AbstractTextResourceViewer extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • actionNexus
            JPanel actionNexus
            The panel hosting the edit and save buttons.
          • agiPanel
            AgiPanel agiPanel
            The parent AgiPanel providing the session context.
          • cancelBtn
            JButton cancelBtn
            The button to cancel editing without saving.
          • cardLayout
            CardLayout cardLayout
            The layout manager for swapping between preview and editor views.
          • cardPanel
            JPanel cardPanel
            The container panel for the card layout.
          • controlStrip
            JToolBar controlStrip
            The integrated toolbar for edit actions.
          • copyBtn
            JButton copyBtn
            The button to copy the current content to clipboard.
          • editBtn
            JButton editBtn
            The button to toggle between View and Edit modes.
          • editing
            boolean editing
            Flag indicating the current UI mode (view vs edit).
          • previewAsEditor
            boolean previewAsEditor
            If true, the 'Preview' mode uses the high-fidelity editor component (read-only) instead of the viewport. This ensures snippets don't lose text when saving.

            Clean-Room Default: snippets (virtual resources) default to true.

          • resource
            Resource resource
            The resource orchestrator being viewed.
          • resourceListener
            EdtPropertyChangeListener resourceListener
            The reactive listener for resource state changes.
          • saveAction
            AbstractTextResourceViewer.SaveAction saveAction
            The delegate responsible for persistence.
          • syncing
            boolean syncing
            Flag used to disable listeners during UI synchronization to prevent recursive feedback loops.
          • verticalScrollEnabled
            boolean verticalScrollEnabled
            Flag indicating if vertical scrolling is enabled. Defaults to true (Resource Panel). Should be set to false for Chat Snippets.

    • Package uno.anahata.asi.swing.components

      • Class uno.anahata.asi.swing.components.AdjustingTabPane

        class AdjustingTabPane extends JTabbedPane implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • minHeight
            int minHeight
            The absolute minimum height to maintain for this tab pane.

            This ensures a baseline visibility even if the content of the selected tab is smaller or null.

      • Class uno.anahata.asi.swing.components.CodeHyperlink

        class CodeHyperlink extends JLabel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • contentSupplier
            Supplier<String> contentSupplier
            A supplier for the content to display, allowing for lazy loading and formatting.

            The content is fetched only when the user clicks the hyperlink. This is ideal for large JSON payloads or code blocks that require expensive processing.

          • language
            String language
            The language for syntax highlighting in the popup dialog.

            Supports standard RSyntaxTextArea constants like "json", "java", "xml", etc. If set to "json", the content will be automatically pretty-printed.

          • titleSupplier
            Supplier<String> titleSupplier
            A supplier for the title of the popup dialog.

            This title is displayed at the top of the dialog window when the hyperlink is clicked. It can be dynamically generated based on the current state.

      • Class uno.anahata.asi.swing.components.ExceptionDialog

        class ExceptionDialog extends JDialog implements Serializable

      • Class uno.anahata.asi.swing.components.ScrollablePanel

        class ScrollablePanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • scrollableTracksViewportHeight
            boolean scrollableTracksViewportHeight
            Whether this panel's height should always match the viewport's height.

            When true, vertical scrolling is effectively disabled.

          • scrollableTracksViewportWidth
            boolean scrollableTracksViewportWidth
            Whether this panel's width should always match the viewport's width.

            When true, horizontal scrolling is effectively disabled and components are expected to wrap or scale.
